title: Made in Abyss Mobs
description: Adds creatures from Made in Abyss into Minecraft
body:
Have any suggestion? Want to report a bug? We have a Discord server! You can join and ask anything you want

 

Introduction

This mod aims to add many different creatures from the manga series and anime Made in Abyss. The intent of this mod is to feel like you're living in the wilderness of the Made in Abyss world, so this means that only natural creatures will be added (No Narehates/Hollows or human characters).
It's as simple as it gets, only mobs will be added plus a few items to make things a little more interesting.

 

 

This mod is for Forge and there will never be a Fabric port.

 

List of mobs & information about them


There are a lot of mobs in this mod, so if you want to know about them, you'll have to read this Google Doc. Click here to get to a guide of all the new mobs added by the mod.

 

Items added by the mod

The items added in this mod are mostly just food items, there isn't much to them, although I highly recommend using Just Enough Items in case you need to know some crafting recipe the mod may add.

 

Abyssal Egg

Dropped by Hammerbeak, Stinger, Stinger (Ancestor), Stinger (Subspecies), Corpse-Weeper & Light-Eater.

 

Stick Miso

Obtained through crafting (wheat + mushrooms). Used for many different prepared food recipes. Can also be eaten on its own.

 

Sainona Greens

Found anywhere that has grass.

 

Gintoko

Found in Dark Forests & Swamps.

 

Ouba Leaf

Found anywhere that has grass.

 

Zutsugi Root

Found anywhere underground.

 

Magotato

Found in Beaches, Rivers & Oceanic biomes, but only on land.

 

Shayoukoube

Found in Swamps.

 

Low-Grade Poison Antidote

This item is able to heal Poison I from the player. It fails when the Poison level that the player has is superior to I.

 

Poison Antidote

This items is able to heal Poison from the player. This item can heal any level of Poison the player may have.

 

 

You can click here to get to Just Enough Items.
